docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CARCAMO, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, VIDAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, VIDAL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, VIDAL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARCAMO, OLGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, VIDAL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00, DEFT. TO PAY PLFT. $150. ON 11/20/96. DEFT TO MAKE PAYMENTS BY MONEY ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
